transcript_corrections.before: The eighth son of yours is the eighth Vasu. Prabhasha.
transcript_corrections.after: The eighth son of yours is the eighth Vasu.

transcript_corrections.before: Karna about to creeper and then asked his charioteer to take him to the middle of the pond.
transcript_corrections.after: turned about Kripa and then asked his charioteer to take him to the middle of the Pandava.

transcript_corrections.before: Duryodhana called the priests and formally consecrated Karna as the Kaurava commander in chief.
transcript_corrections.after: Duryodhan called the priests and formally consecrated Karna as the Kaurava commander-in-chief.

emotion_flags.issue: Contradictory acoustics and low audio quality
